sql_array: CREATE TABLE registry_settings (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, value TEXT);
INSERT INTO registry_settings (name, value) VALUES ('setting1', 'value1'), ('setting2', 'value2'), ('setting3', NULL), ('setting4', '');
SELECT * FROM registry_settings WHERE name IN (SELECT get_keyword(value, 'setting1') FROM registry_get_all(NEW record_type())) ORDER BY name;
SELECT name, value FROM registry_settings WHERE value IS NULL OR value = '';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registry_settings GROUP BY value HAVING COUNT(value) > 1;
SELECT * FROM registry_settings WHERE name = (SELECT name FROM registry_settings ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 1) AND value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT registry_get_all(NEW record_type()) FROM (SELECT name, value FROM registry_settings WHERE NEW record_type() IS NOT NULL) AS subquery WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO registry_settings (name, value) VALUES (NEW record_type(), CAST(NULL AS TEXT));
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM registry_settings WHERE (LOWER(value) LIKE '%value%') OR (NEW record_type() IS NULL);
